prompt: Build a rental NFT system where users can rent NFTs for a fixed duration.
Create an ERC20 token with minting and burning functionality.
Build a smart contract for decentralized voting where users can vote for proposals.
Create a crowdfunding smart contract where users can contribute funds until a funding goal is reached.
Develop an escrow smart contract that holds funds until both parties approve the transaction.
Build a multi-signature wallet where multiple owners must approve transactions.
Create a DAO governance contract where token holders can propose and vote on decisions.
Develop an NFT marketplace where users can list, buy, and sell NFTs.
Build a timelock smart contract where funds can only be withdrawn after a specific time.
Create a smart contract for a decentralized auction where users can place bids.
